heading: Under Secretary of Agriculture for Food, Nutrition, and Consumer Services
label: 6951 Under Secretary of Agriculture for Food, Nutrition, and Consumer Services
notes: CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (e) of amended , Government Organization and Employees.section 241 of Pub. L. 103–354section 241 of Pub. L. 103–354section 5314 of Title 5
amendments: CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (e) of amended , Government Organization and Employees.section 241 of Pub. L. 103–354section 241 of Pub. L. 103–354section 5314 of Title 5

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: The Secretary is authorized to establish in the Department the position of Under Secretary of Agriculture for Food, Nutrition, and Consumer Services.

children.heading: Confirmation required
children.label: b Confirmation required
children.text: If the Secretary establishes the position of Under Secretary of Agriculture for Food, Nutrition, and Consumer Services authorized under subsection (a), the Under Secretary shall be appointed by the President, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate.

children.heading: Principal functions
children.label: 1 Principal functions
children.text: Upon establishment, the Secretary shall delegate to the Under Secretary of Agriculture for Food, Nutrition, and Consumer Services those functions under the jurisdiction of the Department that are related to food, nutrition, and consumer services (except as provided in ).section 6981(b)(1) of this title

children.heading: Additional functions
children.label: 2 Additional functions
children.text: The Under Secretary of Agriculture for Food, Nutrition, and Consumer Services shall perform such other functions as may be required by law or prescribed by the Secretary.

children.heading: Succession
children.label: d Succession
children.text: Any official who is serving as Assistant Secretary of Agriculture for Food and Consumer Services on , and who was appointed by the President, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate, shall not be required to be reappointed under subsection (b) to the successor position authorized under subsection (a) if the Secretary establishes the position, and the official occupies the new position, within 180 days after (or such later date set by the Secretary if litigation delays rapid succession).October 13, 1994October 13, 1994
